headlines.title: Brent oil price hovers near $95 as Rubio says U.S. will 'continue to protect shipping' in Hormuz
headlines.summary: The U.S. has launched strikes against Iran for 11 consecutive days, citing a need to "degrade Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping."

headlines.title: Mortgage rates are rising again, but homebuyers are seeing some advantages
headlines.summary: Mortgage rates last week rose to the highest level since last August, but homebuyer demand climbed as well, as buyers see more supply.

headlines.title: Trump's push for American-made AI chips hits TSMC's margins
headlines.summary: The Taiwan-based chipmaker has announced $200 billion in investment into U.S. manufacturing since Trump returned to power in 2025.

headlines.title: Peacock is getting a lift from World Cup, Spanish-language content
headlines.summary: Peacock attracted new subscribers with the Spanish-language telecast of the World Cup, and executives say advertisers are taking notice.

headlines.title: Citizens United provision allowing foreign campaign contributions draws Democratic bill
headlines.summary: Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., and Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse, D-R.I., want to establish foreign ownership thresholds for companies that spend on campaigns.

headlines.title: Kalshi launches election hub for prediction markets ahead of midterms
headlines.summary: The company said the page gives viewers of its event contracts a central place to see speculators' outlook for the midterm elections.

headlines.title: Time for a crypto comeback? Traders bet that this stock will lead the way
headlines.summary: Crypto bulls have been waiting for a rebound, and traders think this stock could lead the way.

headlines.title: Tesla shares poised for biggest earnings move in a year
headlines.summary: Shares of Elon Musk's electric vehicle company are expected to see a sharp swing after Tesla rolls out its quarterly report.

headlines.title: Bets against SpaceX grow to 32% of float as Elon Musk warns short sellers won't survive
headlines.summary: About 206 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 32% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.summary: Here are three dividend-paying stocks that are highlighted by Wall Street's top pros, as tracked by TipRanks.

headlines.title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
headlines.summary: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.

headlines.title: Two unexpected revelations in Warren Buffett's CNBC interview
headlines.summary: Warren Buffett tells CNBC that Bill Gates' ties to Jeffrey Epstein didn't drive his termination of donations.

headlines.title: Artificial intelligence will drive an unprecedented natural-gas deficit, this investor warns. Here are the stocks to buy before the crunch.
headlines.summary: Chronometer Partners’ Matthew Smith says investors and markets are not prepared for a natural-gas shortage.

headlines.title: Having $100,000 invested was once the gateway to building real wealth. For young people today, it’s double that.
headlines.summary: While this investing benchmark is still worth celebrating, young people who want to feel rich in today’s economy need to have a lot more.

headlines.title: Do I use $300,000 of my $1.2 million retirement savings so my daughter can attend her dream college?
headlines.summary: “Our daughter is a highly ranked competitive softball pitcher with a 3.94 GPA.”

headlines.title: Bond-market weakness makes a strong investment case for this unloved sector, strategist says
headlines.summary: Michael Darda says the yield on the 10-year Treasury will fall, so he likes beleaguered home builders.

headlines.title: Oil prices climb to six-week high as hopes of de-escalation in Iran diminish
headlines.summary: West Texas Intermediate and Brent crude’s front-month contracts rose almost 4% on Wednesday after an 11th night of attacks in Iran.

headlines.title: The Treasury market is on the verge of a worrying milestone not seen since 2007
headlines.summary: There are a host of challenges at work as the ‘long’ 30-year Treasury yield approaches its longest stretch above 5% in 19 years

Cash position at 9.2% exceeds minimum cash buffer requirement of 5%.
Lack of exposure to preferred themes such as AI / compute infrastructure, small modular reactors / clean energy, and cybersecurity.

Consider reallocating funds from trimmed positions into preferred themes such as AI / compute infrastructure or clean energy.
